$comment: Per-format config for the keys in formats.json (which stays a bare key->path string map for old CLIs). Read by the Gooseworks backend sync (sync-ad-formats -> ad_formats table -> /create format tabs + info panel) and by the gooseworks CLI master skill. Scoped to migrated formats; add the rest (photo-grid, music-video) as their skills land in goose-skills.

static.title: Static image
static.description: Recreate a static graphic ad (Pinterest pin, feed image, poster) for your brand — same layout and energy, your product and copy.

imessage.title: iMessage conversation
imessage.description: A 9:16 chat-reveal ad — bubbles pop in over time, the brand + promo code surface in the conversation, real iMessage sounds. ~20s, exports 9:16 and 1:1.

chatgpt.title: ChatGPT
chatgpt.description: A 9:16 'I asked ChatGPT' ad — the user types a question, the answer streams in word-by-word with the brand as the natural recommendation. Silent, no end card. ~12s, exports 9:16 and 1:1.

apple-notes.title: Apple Notes
apple-notes.description: A 9:16 typing-reveal ad — a note types itself out in the Apple Notes app, the brand and promo code land in the text, real iPhone keyboard clicks underneath. ~12–20s, exports 9:16.
